Metadata.title: WIG Tracker
Metadata.description: Focus on your most important goals.

Dashboard.teamWeeklyScoreboardDesc: Lead measure achievement for all team members this week.
Dashboard.noWorkspaceDesc: To view the team dashboard, you must join a workspace first.
Dashboard.noScoreboardDesc: Create a scoreboard to track your goals.
Dashboard.weekViewDesc: Shows the week (Mon-Sun) containing the selected date.
Dashboard.monthViewDesc: Aggregates the entire month containing the selected date.
Dashboard.weeklyLeadMeasuresDesc: Weekly goals ({count}) are tracked for this week, and monthly goals ({monthlyCount}) are tracked as month-to-date.
Dashboard.historyLimitMessage: Data older than 6 months is restricted.
Dashboard.monthlyBoardDesc: View all records for the selected month by week.
Dashboard.noMonthlyMeasures: No monthly lead measures for this month.

Celebration.allSuccess: 100% Achieved for all lead measures this week!
Celebration.singleSuccessFallback: 100% Achieved for lead measure this week!

Scoreboard.onlyOneActiveDesc: Only one scoreboard can be active at a time.
Scoreboard.archivedScoreboardsDesc: View your past scoreboards and reactivate them if needed.
Scoreboard.noActiveDesc: Reactivate an archived scoreboard or create a new one.
Scoreboard.confirmArchive: Do you want to archive the current active scoreboard?
Scoreboard.noWorkspaceArchiveDesc: The scoreboard archive is available after joining a workspace.
Scoreboard.archiveDesc: View all your scoreboards and manage active/archived status.

Setup.description: Set one goal (WIG), its success metric (lag measure), and key actions (lead measures).
Setup.archiveDesc: End the current goal and save it as an execution record.
Setup.confirmArchive: Do you want to archive this scoreboard?
Setup.goalQuestion: What is your most important goal?
Setup.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Complete a 5km run in 8 weeks
Setup.lagMeasureQuestion: How will you measure success? (X → Y)
Setup.lagTip1Text: Are the start (X) and target (Y) points clear?
Setup.lagTip2Text: Does it represent final goal achievement?
Setup.leadMeasureQuestion: What actions will you take each week for success?
Setup.leadMeasurePlaceholder: e.g., Run 4 times a week for 30 min
Setup.leadTip1Text: Does this action improve the lag measure?
Setup.leadTip2Text: Is it an action you can directly control?
Setup.deleteTagConfirm: Do you want to delete this tag?
Setup.tagLimit: You can add up to {n} tags for classification.
Setup.newTagPlaceholder: Add tag (e.g., Morning routine, max {n} chars)
Setup.deleteTagConfirmExtended: Do you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all associated measures.

Coachmark.goalContent: A good WIG is about choosing 'what is most important'. Too many goals results in lack of focus. Set only one for this period.
Coachmark.lagContent: A lag measure shows the final result. Write a metric measuring WIG achievement in the form 'X to Y by date'.
Coachmark.leadContent: Lead measures are predictive actions that change the result. They must be influenceable. Write daily/weekly recurring actions.
Coachmark.tagsContent: Create and attach tags here to categorize similar actions. These tags will also be shown on your dashboard.

Toast.tagLimitReached: You can only select up to {n} tags.
Toast.tagNameTooLong: Tag name must be {n} characters or less.
Toast.fillRequiredFields: Please enter a WIG, lag measure, and at least one lead measure.
Toast.archiveSuccess: Scoreboard archived. You can now create a new one.
Toast.duplicatedTag: A tag with the same name already exists.

ProfilePassword.cardDesc: Check your current password and change it to a new one.
ProfilePassword.newPasswordHint: 8+ characters with English, numbers, and allowed special characters.

WorkspaceOverLimit.title: FREE member limit exceeded
WorkspaceOverLimit.adminDesc: {count} members are currently in this workspace, while FREE allows {limit}. Existing data is kept, but tracking and operations are limited until you remove members or upgrade to STANDARD.
WorkspaceOverLimit.memberDesc: This workspace is over the FREE limit of {limit} members and is currently read-only. Contact a workspace admin to resume tracking and operations.

ProfileDeleteAccount.cardDesc: Deleting your account will remove all data and cannot be recovered. Please decide carefully.
ProfileDeleteAccount.warningText: Deleting your account removes scoreboards, lead measures, logs, and workspace participation data. This cannot be undone.
ProfileDeleteAccount.confirmationTextHint: Type the phrase above exactly to delete your account.
ProfileDeleteAccount.deleteSuccess: Account deleted successfully. We hope to see you again.

errors.confirmationMismatch: Please enter the confirmation text exactly.

ProfileMembers.invitesCardDesc: Invite members via the invite code management page.

ProfileMembers.noWorkspaceDesc: Member management is available after creating a workspace.

ProfileInvites.newInviteDesc: Set the maximum number of uses and issue an invite code.

ProfileInvites.inviteListDesc: Copy codes and manage active/inactive status.
ProfileInvites.overLimitInviteDisabled: New invite codes are disabled while this FREE workspace is over the member limit. Remove members until the workspace has 10 or fewer members, or upgrade to STANDARD.
ProfileInvites.activeInviteOverLimit: This code cannot be used to join while the workspace is over the member limit.
ProfileInvites.noWorkspaceDesc: Invite management is available after creating a workspace.
ProfileInvites.noAccessDesc: Only workspace admins can create or toggle invite status.
ProfileInvites.statusChangeFailed: Failed to change invite code status.

Profile.nicknameChangeDesc: Change the name displayed on the dashboard.

Profile.workspaceDeleteDescFull: Deletes all data including members, scoreboards, and logs.

To confirm deletion, please type the workspace name:

Coachmark.personalReminderContent: Turn on push notifications and pick a time here to receive reminders at your preferred time each day.

Export.invalidRange: End date must be after start date.

Notification.timeChanged: Daily reminder time has been changed.

ProfileBilling.pendingDesc: Right after checkout, it can take a moment for the webhook to update your workspace. Refresh in a moment to check the latest status.
ProfileBilling.actionsAdminDesc: Workspace admins can start a STANDARD upgrade or open billing management from here.
ProfileBilling.actionsMemberDesc: You can view the current plan and billing status, but only workspace admins can manage billing.
ProfileBilling.downgradePolicyTitle: Member limit after returning to FREE
ProfileBilling.downgradePolicyDesc: If this workspace returns to FREE after cancellation, refund, or revocation while it has more than 10 members, existing data and members are kept. Tracking and operations are limited until you remove members or upgrade to STANDARD again.
ProfileBilling.memberNotice: Changing payment methods, canceling, and re-subscribing are currently limited to workspace admins.
ProfileBilling.standardDesc: Run the core execution loop on Free, then expand your team operations with STANDARD.
ProfileBilling.standardFeature1: CSV export for meeting materials and operational reporting
ProfileBilling.standardFeature2: Longer history for records and reports than the free plan
ProfileBilling.standardFeature3: Expanded features for leader intervention and tighter team operations
ProfileBilling.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout. Please try again later.
ProfileBilling.checkoutUnavailable: A new checkout is not available in the current state. Open billing management to review the current subscription instead.
ProfileBilling.checkoutReviewRequired: A new checkout cannot be started right now because recent refund or cancellation history needs manual review. Please contact support.
ProfileBilling.portalFailed: Could not open the billing management page. Please try again later.
ProfileBilling.checkoutPending: Payment confirmation is in progress. Please check the status again shortly.
ProfileBilling.riskReviewTitle: This workspace has billing history that needs manual review
ProfileBilling.riskReviewDesc: Within the last 30 days, we detected {refundCount} refund(s) and {revokedCount} immediate cancellation(s). A new checkout is paused until support reviews the workspace.
ProfileBilling.loadFailedDesc: Please try again shortly or refresh the page to check the latest status.
ProfileBilling.noWorkspaceTitle: You are not in a workspace yet
ProfileBilling.noWorkspaceDesc: Plan and billing information become available after you join or create a workspace.
ProfileBilling.statusDescFree: You are currently on the FREE plan. Upgrade to STANDARD when you need more team operations features.
ProfileBilling.statusDescStandardFallback: You are currently using the STANDARD plan.
ProfileBilling.statusDescActive: Your STANDARD plan is active. The next reference date is {date}.
ProfileBilling.statusDescCanceled: Even if cancellation is scheduled, STANDARD features remain available until the end date. The scheduled end date is {date}.
ProfileBilling.statusDescExpired: Your paid access period has ended and the workspace is now back on the FREE plan.
ProfileBilling.statusDescRevoked: Paid access was removed immediately due to a refund or forced cancellation.

ProductUpdates.latestDesc: Quickly browse what's new and try them out.

2026-04-14-personal-reminder-schedule.title: Customize your personal record reminder time
2026-04-14-personal-reminder-schedule.summary: You can now receive daily record reminder push notifications at a time that fits your lifestyle from the profile notification settings.

2026-04-14-lead-measure-tags.title: Organize lead measures more systematically with tags
2026-04-14-lead-measure-tags.summary: Create tags in the settings and attach them to lead measures to easily distinguish behavior categories on your dashboard.

2026-03-25-team-dashboard-memos.title: Leave meeting memos directly on the team dashboard
2026-03-25-team-dashboard-memos.summary: You can now write down and check memos or action items next to each team member's weekly scoreboard during WIG meetings.

2026-03-22-team-dashboard-me-highlight.title: Find your card faster on the team dashboard
2026-03-22-team-dashboard-me-highlight.summary: Your card is now sorted at the top of the team member list and clearly distinguished with a border and 'Me' badge.

2026-03-18-dashboard-export.title: Download your records as CSV
2026-03-18-dashboard-export.summary: When you need to review or share, you can pick a period and lead measures to save them immediately.

2026-03-16-dashboard-period-navigation.title: View past weekly and monthly records more easily
2026-03-16-dashboard-period-navigation.summary: You can now navigate between weekly and monthly views to check trends based on any date you want.

ApiError.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this resource.
ApiError.TEST_ACCOUNT_WRITE_RESTRICTED: Test accounts are restricted to tracking recordings and profile icon changes.
ApiError.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
ApiError.INTERNAL_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
ApiError.SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please log in again.
ApiError.LAST_ADMIN_ACCOUNT_DELETION_FORBIDDEN: The only admin cannot delete their account. Transfer ownership or delete the workspace first.
ApiError.EXPIRED_INVITE_CODE: Invite code has expired. Request a new one from the admin.
ApiError.INVITE_CODE_USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED: Invite code limit reached. Request a new one from the admin.
ApiError.CUSTOM_ID_ALREADY_EXISTS: This ID is already in use.
ApiError.ALREADY_IN_WORKSPACE: You are already in a workspace.
ApiError.WORKSPACE_MEMBER_LIMIT_REACHED: Cannot join the workspace. Contact the admin.
ApiError.FREE_PLAN_MEMBER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This FREE workspace is over the 10-member limit and is now read-only. Remove members until the workspace has 10 or fewer members, or upgrade to STANDARD.
ApiError.STANDARD_PLAN_REQUIRED: This feature requires a STANDARD plan.
ApiError.WORKSPACE_TAG_ALREADY_EXISTS: A tag with the same name already exists.
ApiError.ADMIN_TRANSFER_REQUIRED: Admins can only delete their account after transferring ownership or deleting the workspace.
ApiError.LEAD_MEASURE_ARCHIVED: Cannot add logs to archived lead measures.
ApiError.FUTURE_DATE_NOT_ALLOWED: Cannot record data for future dates.
ApiError.PAST_WEEK_LOG_EDIT_NOT_ALLOWED: Logs from before last week cannot be modified. Please update current week data only.
ApiError.FREE_PLAN_HISTORY_LIMIT_REACHED: Free plan users can view up to 6 months of history. Upgrade to STANDARD to view older data.
ApiError.BILLING_NOT_READY: Billing integration is not ready yet.
ApiError.BILLING_REVIEW_REQUIRED: This workspace has repeated refund or cancellation history, so a new checkout cannot be started right now. Please contact support.

recovery.title: Save your recovery codes

recovery.failedToCopy: Failed to copy recovery codes. Please save them manually.
recovery.txtDescription: The codes below are used for account recovery. Keep them in a safe place.

errors.nicknameTooLong: Nickname must be 50 characters or less.
errors.invalidPassword: Password must be 8+ characters (mix of letters/numbers/special chars).

recoveryPage.title: Account Recovery
recoveryPage.description: Find your account with a recovery code and reset your password.
recoveryPage.codeHint: Case, hyphens, and spaces are handled automatically.
recoveryPage.resetSuccess: Password reset successful. Please proceed to login.

new.title: Create New Workspace
new.description:
A workspace is a space where your team manages goals together.
Please give it a great name.
new.label: Workspace Name

join.title: Join with Invite Code
join.description: Enter the invitation code received from your team admin.
join.planInfo: FREE plan workspaces can have up to 10 members.
join.label: Invite Code
join.joinFailed: An error occurred while joining the workspace.

Hero.headline:
Busy with tasks,
but stuck on results?
Hero.description: Stop drowning in daily fire-fighting. Focus overwhelmingly on the one wildly important goal that truly matters.

stats.wigGoal:
Retain 40% of customers &
Build new pipeline

MetricBand.title:
Proving how we work
through numbers.
MetricBand.oneTitle: The only one to focus on
MetricBand.oneDesc: Familiar with greedily trying everything but achieving nothing? Boldly drop the trivial. We go all-in on the single goal that can take our team to the next level.
MetricBand.stat1Desc:
Team energy invested in
lead measure actions

WhyWig.header:
The most reliable and proactive flow
to achieve team goals
WhyWig.description:
Outcome metrics are already in the past; we can't change them immediately.
But the 'actions of today' that create those results are planned and 100% controlled by us. Move beyond vague anxiety and gain proactive execution power.
WhyWig.item1Desc: We'll be your compass so you don't get lost among countless tasks. Focus on the single most important and impactful goal that can change the game for your team.
WhyWig.item1VisualDesc: Tasks other than this goal will be deprioritized.
WhyWig.item2Desc: Outcome metrics won't change just by staring at them. Be obsessed with daily 'actions' that firmly drive those metrics instead of just looking at results.
WhyWig.item2VisualTitle: Core lead measures to perform today

ExecutionLoop.title:
The execution flow in 3 stages,
stripped of complexity.
ExecutionLoop.description:
Instead of complex templates that make input a burden,
we propose a most intuitive flow that all team members can look at comfortably and transparently.
ExecutionLoop.step1Title: Zero in on the one goal
ExecutionLoop.step1Desc: Fix the WIG we need to achieve this week at the very top. Look in one direction without being shaken.
ExecutionLoop.step2Desc: Instead of a formal meeting room, fill out your behavior bingo on your dashboard. Achievement builds up daily like breaking seals, creating momentum for execution.
ExecutionLoop.step3Title: The scoreboard of no excuses, weekly review
ExecutionLoop.step3Desc: No need to wait silently for a month. Review achievement status weekly, quickly supplement blocked parts, and keep the team's rhythm.

Features.title:
Eliminate unnecessary management,
leave only transparent execution.
Features.item1Desc: Shared transparently across the workspace so you can visually see if we are winning or losing.
Features.item2Desc: Record your flow of actions lightly right after arriving at work every day.
Features.item3Desc: Review what went well and what was blocked each week, drastically reducing unnecessary meeting time.
Features.item4Desc: Ditch the stiff table views you hate to look at. Clear your remaining actions for today funly, like filling out a bingo card.

Pricing.header:
From light team adoption
to enterprise-wide expansion.
Pricing.description: We've completely removed the barrier to entry. Start building your core execution flow with the Free plan, and expand reasonably when your team's management needs grow.

FREE.description: Optimized for seeing if this methodology really works for your team as you run a single small team.
features: Up to 10 members, enough for a small team
Last 6 months of history to look back at the past half-year
Last 4 weeks of reports to quickly see this month's focus
Full access to the core loop: set goals, record, and weekly reviews
Check team flow together, not just individual logs

STANDARD.description: The plan for leaders who want to directly intervene and drive team execution density beyond just viewing records.
features: Direct reminders sent from leaders to team members
CSV export for meeting materials or reporting
Longer history for records and reports than free
Operational upgrades for tighter team execution management

Footer.headline:
The real flow of execution,
shall we start now?
Footer.description:
We've removed the worry and time spent on initial setup.
Now run towards your goals happily with your team members.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for might have been moved or deleted. Please return to the home page or go to your scoreboard to start again.
NotFound.info: Please double-check the URL you entered. If it's a protected path, you may be redirected to the home page depending on your login status.
